title: HUD - FPS Veltium
description: Displays FPS, coordinates, ping, time, days, and RAM usage – all in one informative HUD! Extensive customization and freedom of action.
body:
# Not Enough HUD Veltium 
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/56455ba779e13a5d5d7ee80f927aa15a861952b3.png)

## Main Features

**New HUD** with clean and readable design
- FPS counter
- Memory usage monitor
- Сoordinates display
- Ping indicator
- Real time display

![Default settings](https://i.postimg.cc/dVSqczYj/2025-07-06-18-43-10-1.png)



## Dependencies
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

## Optional
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
